reviews.comment:
Buen dia!! Veniamos del sur de vacaciones con mi familia y paramos a cargar combustible y comimos en la ypf full. Terminamos y nos olvidamos la mochila , nos dimos cuenta en general acha. Me logre comunicar con sol la encargada y enseguida me dijo que la tenian. Me la guardo y se la dio a un amigo que venia del sur una semana despues intacta. Una genia sol!! . Tuvimos el placer  de cruzarnos con sol y la gente de la ypf que se porto de 10!!  Agradecido de corazon!! Mil graciass!! Mariano

(Translated by Google)
Good morning! My family and I were on vacation from the south and stopped to refuel and eat at the YPF Full station. We finished and realized we'd forgotten our backpack, only realizing it on General Acha Avenue. I managed to contact Sol, the manager, and she immediately told me they had it. She kept it safe for me and gave it to a friend who was coming from the south a week later, completely intact. Sol is amazing! We had the pleasure of meeting Sol and the YPF staff, who were all fantastic! Thank you so much! Mariano
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7652943530366249800/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNOai1DbmJ3EAE

reviews.comment:
